wifiRequests.text: Hey everyone. I’ve been closely following the recent reports on the forum regarding the Unknown Device errors, the multi-gang switch synchronization issues, and the random WiFi disconnects. Behind the scenes, I have been working on a complete architectural rewrite of the app. I wanted to give you a

 WiFi LED Strip RGBCW (Tuya Local)
